task:
In galculator, switch to Scientific mode (so parenthesis keys are available) and evaluate the nested expression exactly as written, with parentheses enforcing grouping:

    ((7 + 3) * (4 + 6)) - ((9 - 2) * (3 + 4))

Computed left-to-right this is `(10 * 10) - (7 * 7)` = `100 - 49` = `51`. The final display must show exactly `51`. Leave galculator open.
